## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on technical SEO progress and define the content roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/Xf5SA_cZ935wtHmg68vSvo7RAyJCMp22?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Redirects Unblocked:** Innerwell's team has a working redirect process, making GrowthX's GitHub access unnecessary. GrowthX will now use Innerwell's Loom tutorials to implement the remaining redirects.](https://fathom.video/share/Xf5SA_cZ935wtHmg68vSvo7RAyJCMp22?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [**New Blog URL Process:** New blogs will now use the new `/ketamine/` URL structure. GrowthX will fix recent posts and create a process to prevent future errors.](https://fathom.video/share/Xf5SA_cZ935wtHmg68vSvo7RAyJCMp22?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [**Content Roadmap Defined:** The roadmap has two tracks: 1) immediately scale ketamine blog content, and 2) test comparison content (e.g., "Innerwell vs. Spravato") to capture high-intent search traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/Xf5SA_cZ935wtHmg68vSvo7RAyJCMp22?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)
  - [**Technical Audit Planned:** GrowthX will run a full technical SEO audit (using Screaming Frog) after all redirects are live to find and fix any new errors.](https://fathom.video/share/Xf5SA_cZ935wtHmg68vSvo7RAyJCMp22?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)

## Topics

### Technical SEO & Redirects

  - [**Redirect Process:** Innerwell's team has a working redirect process, making GrowthX's GitHub access unnecessary.](https://fathom.video/share/Xf5SA_cZ935wtHmg68vSvo7RAyJCMp22?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will use Innerwell's Loom tutorials to implement the remaining redirects (city pages, old `/availability` pages).](https://fathom.video/share/Xf5SA_cZ935wtHmg68vSvo7RAyJCMp22?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [**Index Page Request:** A Prismic-based index page is needed to organize content.](https://fathom.video/share/Xf5SA_cZ935wtHmg68vSvo7RAyJCMp22?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
      - [**Action:** Innerwell will scope the design and assign development.](https://fathom.video/share/Xf5SA_cZ935wtHmg68vSvo7RAyJCMp22?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
  - [**Mental Health Services Page:** This high-level landing page is a prerequisite for all related content redirects.](https://fathom.video/share/Xf5SA_cZ935wtHmg68vSvo7RAyJCMp22?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
      - [**Action:** Innerwell will develop this page after the technical cleanup is complete.](https://fathom.video/share/Xf5SA_cZ935wtHmg68vSvo7RAyJCMp22?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
  - [**Looker Dashboard:** The dashboard will be updated with new regex expressions to reflect the new URL slugs, but only after all redirects are live.](https://fathom.video/share/Xf5SA_cZ935wtHmg68vSvo7RAyJCMp22?tab=summary&timestamp=479.0)

### Blog URL Structure

  - [**Problem:** New blogs are using the old `/reflections/` URL structure instead of the new `/ketamine/` structure.](https://fathom.video/share/Xf5SA_cZ935wtHmg68vSvo7RAyJCMp22?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [**Cause:** A communication error on GrowthX's side.](https://fathom.video/share/Xf5SA_cZ935wtHmg68vSvo7RAyJCMp22?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [**Solution:**](https://fathom.video/share/Xf5SA_cZ935wtHmg68vSvo7RAyJCMp22?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
      - [**Fix:** GrowthX will move the recent posts to the correct URL structure. If they have no traffic, a simple URL change is sufficient; otherwise, a 301 redirect is required.](https://fathom.video/share/Xf5SA_cZ935wtHmg68vSvo7RAyJCMp22?tab=summary&timestamp=714.0)
      - [**Prevention:** GrowthX will create a process to ensure all future blogs use the correct URL structure.](https://fathom.video/share/Xf5SA_cZ935wtHmg68vSvo7RAyJCMp22?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)

### Content Roadmap & New Initiatives

  - [**Ketamine Content Scaling:** GrowthX will immediately increase the cadence of ketamine-related blog posts, building on a proven content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/Xf5SA_cZ935wtHmg68vSvo7RAyJCMp22?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)
  - [**Comparison Content Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/Xf5SA_cZ935wtHmg68vSvo7RAyJCMp22?tab=summary&timestamp=1097.0)
      - [**Goal:** Capture high-intent search traffic by comparing Innerwell's services to competitors and other treatments.](https://fathom.video/share/Xf5SA_cZ935wtHmg68vSvo7RAyJCMp22?tab=summary&timestamp=1097.0)
      - [**Test Cases:**](https://fathom.video/share/Xf5SA_cZ935wtHmg68vSvo7RAyJCMp22?tab=summary&timestamp=1251.0)
          - [Innerwell's ketamine therapy vs. SSRIs (e.g., Lexapro)](https://fathom.video/share/Xf5SA_cZ935wtHmg68vSvo7RAyJCMp22?tab=summary&timestamp=1097.0)
          - [Innerwell's oral tablets vs. Spravato (a key competitor)](https://fathom.video/share/Xf5SA_cZ935wtHmg68vSvo7RAyJCMp22?tab=summary&timestamp=1251.0)
      - [**Playbook:** Use a proven SaaS content model:](https://fathom.video/share/Xf5SA_cZ935wtHmg68vSvo7RAyJCMp22?tab=summary&timestamp=1295.0)
          - [High-level informational page (e.g., "What is Spravato?")](https://fathom.video/share/Xf5SA_cZ935wtHmg68vSvo7RAyJCMp22?tab=summary&timestamp=1295.0)
          - [Alternatives page (e.g., "Spravato Alternatives")](https://fathom.video/share/Xf5SA_cZ935wtHmg68vSvo7RAyJCMp22?tab=summary&timestamp=1295.0)
          - [Direct comparison page (e.g., "Innerwell vs. Spravato")](https://fathom.video/share/Xf5SA_cZ935wtHmg68vSvo7RAyJCMp22?tab=summary&timestamp=1295.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will research keyword volume and draft a test template for Innerwell's medical team to review.](https://fathom.video/share/Xf5SA_cZ935wtHmg68vSvo7RAyJCMp22?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)
  - [**Programmatic City Pages:** Expanding programmatic city pages for other services (e.g., EMDR) is a future possibility, pending data analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/Xf5SA_cZ935wtHmg68vSvo7RAyJCMp22?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Akina (Innerwell):**](https://fathom.video/share/Xf5SA_cZ935wtHmg68vSvo7RAyJCMp22?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)
      - [Share Loom tutorials for redirects, breadcrumbs, and clinician blocks with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/Xf5SA_cZ935wtHmg68vSvo7RAyJCMp22?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)
      - [Scope and assign development for the Prismic index page.](https://fathom.video/share/Xf5SA_cZ935wtHmg68vSvo7RAyJCMp22?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
      - [Develop the Mental Health Services landing page.](https://fathom.video/share/Xf5SA_cZ935wtHmg68vSvo7RAyJCMp22?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
      - [Review pending articles from GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/Xf5SA_cZ935wtHmg68vSvo7RAyJCMp22?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)
  - [**Matthew (GrowthX):**](https://fathom.video/share/Xf5SA_cZ935wtHmg68vSvo7RAyJCMp22?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)
      - [Fix URLs for recent blog posts and implement a new publishing process.](https://fathom.video/share/Xf5SA_cZ935wtHmg68vSvo7RAyJCMp22?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
      - [Research keyword volume for comparison content and draft a test template.](https://fathom.video/share/Xf5SA_cZ935wtHmg68vSvo7RAyJCMp22?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)
      - [Increase the publishing cadence for ketamine-related blogs.](https://fathom.video/share/Xf5SA_cZ935wtHmg68vSvo7RAyJCMp22?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)
  - [**Jakub (GrowthX):**](https://fathom.video/share/Xf5SA_cZ935wtHmg68vSvo7RAyJCMp22?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)
      - [Map out the strategy for programmatic city pages.](https://fathom.video/share/Xf5SA_cZ935wtHmg68vSvo7RAyJCMp22?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
      - [Run a full technical SEO audit (Screaming Frog) after redirects are complete.](https://fathom.video/share/Xf5SA_cZ935wtHmg68vSvo7RAyJCMp22?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)
